texts.desc:
2 monsters, including a Dinosaur monster
You can only use the (2) effect of this card’s name once per turn.
(1) If this card is Link Summoned: You can make it gain ATK equal to half the total original ATK of the Dinosaur monsters used as its material.
(2) During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Dinosaur monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing its material from your field and/or GY, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Dinosaur monsters.
texts.name: Destratification Dino Stratiae
